ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jul-15-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-12-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: June 10, 2008

This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Deborah Neville, CSR 703.

Richard J. Idell, Esq. and Ory Sandel, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Alexandria Ramsey, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Abraham Taylor.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, June 10, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Alexandria Ramsey, and against Defendant Abraham Taylor as follows:

Compensatory Damages - $1,266,090.66.
Punitive Damages - $3,000,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $168,224.75.
Costs - $10,572.51, for a total judgment of $4,444,887.92.

Counsel shall submit a Proposed Judgment to the Court no later than June 12, 2008.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-12-2008 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-09-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
